steps.title: Identify the structure around the blank
steps.content: Left of the blank is the prepositional phrase Between 2006 and which expects a noun to complete the range. Right of the blank begins the noun lions that needs a determiner. The blank must therefore supply the ending year and a word that can modify lions.

steps.title: Apply the introductory phrase rule
steps.content:
Choice D — 2012, these gives 2012, these. The comma after 2012 sets off the introductory prepositional phrase Between 2006 and 2012, allowing the main clause these lions prowled... to follow correctly.

The other three choices either misuse when, create a sentence fragment with a period, or incorrectly introduce a subordinate clause, breaking the sentence structure.

That matches Choice D — 2012, these.
